description_long: This is a large, dark-colored airplane with a distinctive swept wing design and a prominent T-tail configuration. The wings are broad and sharply angled, giving the aircraft a sleek, modern appearance. The fuselage is elongated, with the cockpit positioned at the front and a set of engines mounted under the wings. The landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, suggesting a tricycle configuration with two main gear units and a nose gear. The surface appears to be made of metal, with some lighter gray components such as the landing gear and engine nacelles. The overall design is reminiscent of a military or high-speed jet aircraft, built for both aerodynamic efficiency and structural strength.
description: A large, dark airplane with swept wings, a T-tail, and underwing engines, featuring a tricycle landing gear and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, T-tail, and the overall planform of the airplane.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the height of the T-tail, the underwing engines, and the landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the landing gear, engine placement, and the underside of the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile similar to view 1, showing the T-tail, underwing engines, and landing gear from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept wing configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat configuration and visible canopy windows.
